evals.prompt: Add a new 'post' table to the zero data layer. It should have id, userId, caption (optional), imageUrl, and createdAt fields. Users should only be able to see their own posts. Include basic CRUD mutations.
evals.expected_output: Creates packages/zero-schema/src/models/post.ts with correct schema using @rocicorp/zero column types, serverWhere permission scoped to userId, mutations() call, and TableInsertRow type. Mentions running bun zero:generate.

assertions.name: imports-from-correct-packages
assertions.description: Uses @rocicorp/zero for column types and on-zero for mutations/serverWhere

assertions.name: mentions-generate
assertions.description: Mentions running bun zero:generate after creating the model

assertions.name: exports-type
assertions.description: Exports a TypeScript type using TableInsertRow<typeof schema>

evals.prompt: Write a React hook called useUserPosts that fetches all posts for the current logged-in user, ordered by newest first. Show me how to use it in a component.
evals.expected_output: Creates a query in packages/zero-schema/src/queries/post.ts using zql, then a hook that uses useZeroQuery from ~/zero/client and useAuth() for the userId (not useUser()). Shows component usage with isLoading check.

assertions.name: query-uses-zql
assertions.description: Query function uses zql from on-zero

assertions.name: uses-useAuth-not-useUser
assertions.description: Hook uses useAuth() to get userId, not useUser() - avoids waterfall

assertions.name: enabled-guard
assertions.description: Passes { enabled: Boolean(userId) } option to avoid query with empty userId

evals.prompt: I want to add comments to posts in zero. Each comment has id, postId, userId, text, createdAt. I also need a query that loads a post WITH its comments and each comment's author (user). Walk me through all the steps.
evals.expected_output: Covers: 1) model file for comment, 2) relationship between post->comments and comment->user in relationships.ts, 3) query using .related() for comments and nested .related() for user, 4) run bun zero:generate. Importantly generates IDs/timestamps on the client before calling mutate.

assertions.name: adds-relationships
assertions.description: Adds relationships to relationships.ts and exports in allRelationships array

assertions.name: uses-related-for-nested-data
assertions.description: Query uses .related('comments') and nested .related('user') on comments

assertions.name: mentions-generate-step
assertions.description: Mentions bun zero:generate as a required step

assertions.name: convergence-for-mutations
assertions.description: When showing how to add a comment, generates id and createdAt on the client before calling zero.mutate.comment.insert()
